subtitle: // articles, regulations and accountability

statuten.title: Articles of Association
statuten.description: The notarial deed of incorporation of the association. Recorded on 26 November 2015 by notary mr. Paul Robert Schut in Amsterdam. Contains the name, purpose, rules around members, board, Advisory Council and the General Members Meeting.

hhr.title: Internal Regulations
hhr.description: The practical elaboration of the articles: rules around committees, membership and day to day matters. Ratified by the General Members Meeting and published once final.

jaarverslag.title: Annual Report
jaarverslag.description: The board report and the financial accountability over the past association year (1 September up to and including 31 August). Shared here after approval by the General Members Meeting.

ctaText: Need another document or have a question about our articles? Send us a mail, we are happy to help.
